entry.title: Thinking Machines Lab Drops Its First Model
entry.summary: Inkling, a 975-billion-parameter open source model, was trained to understand video and audio. It could help Thinking Machines establish itself among competitors like Anthropic and OpenAI.

entry.title: TuxBot v3 Evolution Shows Signs of LLM-Assisted IoT Botnet Development
entry.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a previously unreported Internet-of-Things (IoT) botnet framework dubbed TuxBot v3 Evolution that shows signs of being developed with assistance from a large language model (LLM), albeit with not so successful results. "While the AI complied with their request to gene

entry.title: not much happened today
entry.summary: **Thinking Machines Lab** launched **Inkling**, its first fully released open-weights foundation model family, featuring **975B parameters** with **41B active parameters** in a **Mixture-of-Experts** architecture. Inkling supports **multimodality** with text, image, and audio inputs and text output, is **Apache 2.0 lic

entry.title: ollama v0.32.1 released
entry.summary: What's Changed Improved Gemma 4 tool calling and multi-turn reasoning, including more reliable tool-response continuations Fixed a recurrent MLX model cache leak that could increase memory use across requests, and improved cache snapshot performance MLX text model loading now respects OLLAMA_LOAD_TIMEOUT Agent web sear

entry.title: xAI sues a South Carolina man for allegedly using Grok to generate CSAM, in one of the first cases of its kind brought by an AI company against one of its users (Blake Brittain/Reuters)
entry.summary: Blake Brittain / Reuters : xAI sues a South Carolina man for allegedly using Grok to generate CSAM, in one of the first cases of its kind brought by an AI company against one of its users — Elon Musk's artificial-intelligence startup xAI has sued a South Carolina man arrested earlier this year on charges …

entry.title: IBM’s profit warning shows tech valuations are all in the timing
entry.summary: There is a case for believing AI revenue will grow more slowly than the hyperscalers have baked into their plans

entry.title: Ask Before You Diagnose: Safe-Psych, a Sequential Evaluation Benchmark for LLMs in Psychiatry
entry.summary: arXiv:2607.13036v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for decision support in healthcare, but clinical evidence is often incomplete or evolving. When the available information is insufficient to support a reliable answer, models should request clarification or abstain rather

entry.title: Walden Robotics launches at $1.1B valuation for general-purpose robots
entry.summary: Leading technology companies have invested in Walden Robotics, which emerged from stealth as it develops full-stack physical AI. The post Walden Robotics launches at $1.1B valuation for general-purpose robots appeared first on The Robot Report .

entry.title: transformers v5.14.0 released
entry.summary: Release v5.14.0 New Model additions Inkling (fresh from Thinking Machines): 975B total, 41B active Add Inkling model #47347 by @molbap @Cyrilvallez @eustlb and @zucchini-nlp Inkling is a general-purpose multimodal model that accepts text, image and audio inputs and generates text outputs. It is intended for use in Engl

entry.title: What Models Express, Suppress, and Resist: Auditing Open-Weight LLMs with Persona Vectors
entry.summary: arXiv:2607.13162v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: What a language model will and will not do is largely set during post-training, but which behaviors it expresses, hides, or resists is not revealed by prompting alone. Persona vectors, behavioral directions in activation space, can probe this organization, but prior work

entry.title: The US is advancing AI safety through state and federal action
entry.summary: OpenAI outlines a “reverse federalism” approach to AI governance, where state laws help build a national framework for safe, democratic AI.

entry.title: GPT-Red: Unlocking Self-Improvement for Robustness
entry.summary: Explore GPT-Red, OpenAI’s automated red teaming system that uses self-play to improve AI safety, alignment, and prompt injection robustness.

entry.title: Dutch police bust investment fraud ring stealing over €100 million
entry.summary: The Dutch Police announced the arrest of multiple individuals suspected of being part of an international investment fraud scheme estimated to have tens of thousands of victims. [...]

entry.title: The npm Threat Landscape: Attack Surface and Mitigations (Updated July 15)
entry.summary: Unit 42 analyzes npm supply chain evolution post-Shai Hulud. Discover wormable malware, CI/CD persistence, multi-stage attacks and more. The post The npm Threat Landscape: Attack Surface and Mitigations (Updated July 15) appeared first on Unit 42 .

entry.title: Mermaid to Unicode box art (grok-mermaid)
entry.summary: Tool: Mermaid to Unicode box art (grok-mermaid) While exploring the codebase for the newly open-sourced Grok CLI coding agent I came across xai-grok-markdown/src/mermaid.rs , a "self-contained terminal renderer for Mermaid diagrams" written in Rust. I figured it would be fun to try that out in a browser via WebAssembly

entry.title: SPINE: Bridging the Cyber-Physical Gap with Agentic AI
entry.summary: arXiv:2607.13049v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Foundation models have given robots a sophisticated brain for complex decision-making, yet deploying that intelligence into a physical platform still demands tedious, expert-driven calibration. This deployment gap, the robot's spinal cord, remains a primary bottleneck to

entry.title: Logical Qubit Technology Unveils AGate Quantum Cloud Platform and Multi-Year Roadmap
entry.summary: Logical Qubit Technology Co., Ltd has launched its superconducting quantum computing cloud platform at its Quantum Day 2026 event on July 9, 2026. Led by founder and CEO Zhen Wang, the company is positioning the platform as a bridge to lower user barriers and cultivate a B2B ecosystem. At launch, the platform will prov

entry.title: Bonsai 27B is a full open reasoning model that fits on an iPhone
entry.summary: PrismML has compressed a 27-billion-parameter AI model to under 4 GB, small enough to run on an iPhone. In the company's own benchmarks, the smallest version keeps 90 percent of the original performance, with math and coding scores barely affected. Apple is reportedly already testing the compression technology, which c

entry.title: Data center company Csquare raises $1.05B in its US IPO, selling 50M shares at $21 each, below its marketed range of $23 to $27, valuing the company at ~$3.25B (Reuters)
entry.summary: Reuters : Data center company Csquare raises $1.05B in its US IPO, selling 50M shares at $21 each, below its marketed range of $23 to $27, valuing the company at ~$3.25B — Data center provider Csquare (CSQR.N) said on Thursday it raised $1.05 billion in its U.S. initial public offering as investors continued …

entry.title: Applied Computing wants to give oil and gas operators an AI model for the entire plant
entry.summary: Applied Computing has raised a $20M Series A to build a foundation AI model for the oil, gas and petrochemical industry.

entry.title: llama.cpp b10037 released
entry.summary: quant : allow using manual tensor types with --pure ( #25716 ) macOS/iOS: macOS Apple Silicon (arm64) macOS Apple Silicon (arm64, KleidiAI enabled) DISABLED macOS Intel (x64) iOS XCFramework Linux: Ubuntu x64 (CPU) Ubuntu arm64 (CPU) Ubuntu s390x (CPU) Ubuntu x64 (Vulkan) Ubuntu arm64 (Vulkan) Ubuntu x64 (ROCm 7.2) Ubu

entry.title: Qwen 3.6 27B is solid up to 262K context. How high have you guys gone above that using Rope/Yarn scaling?
entry.summary: Stack: i7 12700K | RTX 3090 TI | 96GB RAM Qwen 3.6 27B Q3/Q5 KXL UD I've been pushing Qwen 3.6 27B above 200K ctx all week, and it handles it like a champ. I'm impressed. Today I hit the ceiling at 262K and it's still functioning well and coherent. I'm planning on trying out Yarn to see if I can push it higher. How hig

entry.title: Self-Improvements in Modern Agentic Systems: A Survey
entry.summary: arXiv:2607.13104v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Self-improving autonomous agents are moving from research prototypes to deployed systems. The primary goal is controllable evolution, or adaptation, from experience with minimal or even no human input. This survey frames modern self-improving agents as adaptive systems th

entry.title: EQT Raises Offer Price for Kakaku.com Above Bid by LY, Bain
entry.summary: EQT AB is increasing its tender offer price for Japan’s Kakaku.com Inc., escalating its bidding war with the duo of LY Corp. and Bain Capital for the online data firm.

entry.title: FTSE 100 Live: UK Economy Grew Unexpectedly in May
Federated Explainable Artificial Intelligence: Roles, Architectures, Evaluation, and Open Challenges
entry.summary: arXiv:2607.13045v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Federated Learning (FL) has emerged as a key paradigm for privacy-preserving collaborative model training across distributed and heterogeneous data sources. By keeping raw data local, FL addresses data confidentiality concerns, yet it does not resolve the opacity of moder

entry.title: Interventional Grounding Audits: Black-Box Premise-Dependency Tests for LLM Chain-of-Thought via Predicate Substitution
entry.summary: arXiv:2607.13069v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models produce chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning that appears logically sound yet may not genuinely depend on its stated premises. We introduce interventional grounding audits, a black-box, step-level test of premise dependency: we intervene on a single prem

entry.title: OpenAI finally launches hardware… for Codex
entry.summary: OpenAI is finally releasing some hardware. No, it isn't the mysterious AI-powered device the company is developing with former Apple designer Jony Ive, a project already tangled up in a messy lawsuit. Instead, it's a product designed to be used with its coding platform, Codex. The device, a square-shaped block of butto

entry.title: GitHub for Beginners: Your roadmap to mastering the GitHub essentials
entry.summary: New to GitHub? This beginner's guide explains version control, repositories, and pull requests—plus everything else you need to start working confidently on GitHub. The post GitHub for Beginners: Your roadmap to mastering the GitHub essentials appeared first on The GitHub Blog .

entry.title: Text2Sign: A Single-GPU Diffusion Baseline for Text-to-Sign Language Video Generation
entry.summary: arXiv:2607.13164v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Sign language is a primary communication channel for millions of Deaf and hard-of-hearing people, yet text-to-signer video generation remains costly because video diffusion models are expensive to train and evaluate. This paper presents Text2Sign, a text-conditioned diffu
